lineup_source: Uruguay vs Saudi Arabia, Group H, 15 June 2026 (4-4-2)

players.name: Fernando Muslera
players.note: Born in Buenos Aires, Argentina; moved with family to Montevideo early in life. No parental birthplaces documented; family appears Uruguayan given relocation to Uruguay (medium confidence).

players.name: Guillermo Varela
players.note: Born in Montevideo, Uruguay. Wikipedia notes Uruguayan people of Galician/Spanish descent in categories, indicating distant ancestry only; no parent born abroad documented.

players.name: Sebastián Cáceres
players.note: Born in the Nuevo París neighbourhood of Montevideo, Uruguay on 18 August 1999. No parental origin information documented on Wikipedia.

players.name: Mathías Olivera
players.note: Born in Montevideo, Uruguay on 31 October 1997. Full name Mathías Olivera Miramontes; no parental birthplace or foreign origin documented.

players.name: Matías Viña
players.note: Born in Empalme Olmos, Uruguay on 9 November 1997. Full name Matías Nicolás Viña Susperreguy; no parental birthplace or foreign origin documented.

players.name: Federico Valverde
players.note: Born in Montevideo, Uruguay. Parents Julio Valverde and Doris Dipetta; Wikipedia notes 'of Spanish and Italian descent' but this refers to distant ancestry — no parent documented as born abroad or immigrated.

players.name: Manuel Ugarte
players.note: Born in Montevideo, Uruguay. Wikipedia notes 'of Basque descent' but this refers to distant ancestry only; no parent documented as born abroad or immigrated.

players.name: Rodrigo Bentancur
players.note: Born in Nueva Helvecia, Uruguay to Roberto Bentancur and Mary Colmán; Wikipedia notes 'of Irish, Spanish, and Swiss descent' (distant ancestry only). Parents are documented as Uruguayan-born; no foreign parent origin noted.

players.name: Maximiliano Araújo
players.note: Born in Montevideo, Uruguay on 15 February 2000. Full name Maximiliano Javier Araújo Vilches; no parental birthplace or foreign origin documented.

players.name: Federico Viñas
players.note: Born in Montevideo, Uruguay on 30 June 1998. Full name Federico Sebastián Viñas Barboza; no parental birthplace or foreign origin documented.

players.name: Darwin Núñez
players.note: Born in Artigas, Uruguay. Father Bibiano Núñez (a builder) and mother Silvia Ribeiro (a milk bottle hawker) are named in Wikipedia with no documented foreign origin.
